content.text:
⊰IUTP

I'll read all the PNG image files to analyze the Figma design pages.

⊰IUTP

| Page | Description |
| --- | --- |
| figma-180.png | User behavior note: selecting "Use all" updates points and real values |
| figma-181.png | User behavior note: entering points value auto-updates real value |
| figma-182.png | Cashback na fatura screen: Define cashback amount with points/reais inputs |
| figma-184.png | Business rule note: excess discount applied to next invoice |
| figma-185.png | Cashback na fatura info screen: Four bullet points with interaction details |
| figma-190.png | Business rule note: discount only applies to open invoices |
| figma-191.png | Cashback na fatura screen: Define amount with validation error state |
| figma-195.png | Cashback na fatura confirmation screen: Review and confirm cashback details |
| figma-201.png | Pular onboarding screen: Use points to reduce plan payments illustration |
| figma-204.png | Discount applied automatically screen: Woman at desk illustration |
| figma-205.png | User behavior note: auto-correction when value exceeds available amount |
| figma-206.png | User behavior note: "Use all" updates points and real value fields |
| figma-207.png | User behavior note: points/reais entry triggers automatic calculation |
| figma-209.png | Desconto na mensalidade input screen: Define discount amount with inputs |
| figma-210.png | Desconto na mensalidade confirmation: Review and confirm discount details |
| figma-211.png | Desconto na mensalidade populated screen: 500 points, R$150 discount amount |
| figma-213.png | Desconto na mensalidade confirmation: Shows 500 points and R$150.00 discount |
| figma-214.png | Desconto na mensalidade confirmation: Template variable syntax visible |
| figma-219.png | Desconto na mensalidade review screen: Confirmation with discount timing |
| figma-221.png | Desconto na mensalidade confirmation: 500 points, R$150.00 with info banner |
